creator: fpscha@schapachnik.com.ar
text:
Spanish users use ISO-8859-1 character set and set their LANG in es_ES.ISO_8859-1. When using vi, messages on the botton line appear with worng characters due to the fact that /usr/share/vi/catalog/spanish is written in extended-ASCII.

Fix: Here is a diff that corrects the problem.	
How-To-Repeat: 
setenv LANG es_ES.ISO_8859-1
Enter vi, and look at the messages on the bottom line
